summary: Apricot Seed Equivalent plant: Prunus armeniaca va
To downbear qi and transform phlegm, relieve cough and calm asthma, moisten intestines and free stool.
Cough, asthma and fullness due to external contraction cough, intestinal dry and constipation.
1. Amygdalin, one of its components, is an antitussive. Over dosage may cause dizziness, headache and vomiting.2. Its decoction exerts an hypotensive effect in experimental animals.
For desolving phlegm, stopping cougth, and soothing breathing
